title: Should You Buy This Year's Worst-Performing S&P 500 Stocks for 2024?
text: These five S&P 500 stocks have plunged nearly 46% or more in 2023. The reasons behind their declines include macroeconomic factors and falling demand for key products.

title: Buffett, Dollar Tree Purchases Highlight Pre-Christmas Insider Buying
text: Ahead of the holiday weekend (and the end of the year), Berkshire Hathaway made another big buy of the Oracle of Omaha's favorite oil and gas exploration and production company.

title: 2 Growth Stocks That Can Bounce Back in 2024
text: PayPal is a top payment processor, but rising competition has made investors overly concerned. Dollar Tree has faced multiple headwinds, but several catalysts could strengthen its growth next year.
